title: Legnica、Lower Silesian — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Legnica、Lower Silesianの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

LegnicaはLower Silesianにある人口99,350の都市です。A historic city in Lower Silesia with a beautifully restored market square, a copper mining heritage, and a strategic location near the German border.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
